subject: [PATCH v6 05/20] nfsd: update the fsnotify mark when setting or removing a dir delegation

2026-06-11.patch_summary: This patch updates the fsnotify mark when setting or removing a directory delegation in the NFS daemon. It introduces a new helper function, nfsd_fsnotify_recalc_mask(), which recalculates the fsnotify mask based on the leases present. The function is called when directory delegations are added or removed and ensures that concurrent calls to this function do not interfere with each other by using a mutex to serialize access to the lease state and mark update. This patch addresses potential issues where a recalculation working from stale data could clobber a concurrent update, leaving the mark missing required events.
